TAILWEED PIXEL STUDIO

GAME DEV TOOLKIT // V1.0.0

SIZE
COORDS: 0, 0 | ZOOM: 24x
ACTIVE LAYER: Base | ACTIVE FRAME: Frame 1

COLOR PALETTE

#00F0FF PRIMARY / SECONDARY
RECENTLY USED

GAME SIMULATOR

PHYSICS ON
WASD / ARROWS
🎮 ACTION RUNNER PREVIEW 60 FPS

Draw frames below to animate your sprite! Walk loop runs automatically, jump frame displays in mid-air. Use WASD/Arrows to play.

LAYERS

ANIMATION TIMELINE

FPS: 8

KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS

Pencil Tool B
Eraser Tool E
Paint Bucket Fill G
Color Picker (Eyedropper) I
Line Tool L
Rectangle Tool R
Circle Tool C
Selection Tool S
Undo Action Ctrl + Z
Redo Action Ctrl + Y
Pan Canvas Hold Space + Drag mouse
Zoom Canvas Scroll Wheel
Delete Selection Content Delete / Backspace

CUSTOM GRID SIZE
